metadata.delay: how many milliseconds before next event

events.text:
SYSTEM ALERT:
Destination Locked | Magnetar T-9

ADAM:
This is the final resource that we need.
We should be able to do it quick and easy!

SYSTEM ALERT:
Huge Ship Signature Detected.

T-9 Dread Commander:
Stay back, Pilot!
You're just a puppet to a glorified toaster.
You have no idea what you're reaching for.

T-9 Dread Commander:
This is your last warning!
You stand no chance against our warship!

ADAM:
Ignore their posturing, Pilot. Target the hull.
Tear it apart.

T-9 Dread Commander:
Arrogant machine! Let see your 'star pilot'
dodge at lightspeed!
